3rd International STEM EDucation Conference Was Held at Our University

04.07.2022

The 3rd International STEM Education Conference  was held on 2-3 July at the Ibn Haldun University Complex.

Workshops, sessions and activities were organized in the 2-day event, which started with the opening speeches of our Hasan Özcan from Aksaray University and Prof. Gültekin Çakmakçı from Hacettepe University, on Saturday, 2 July.

Click for

the events that took place at the 3rd International STEM Teachers Conference, where more than 300 participants from 16 different countries exhibited their work in interactive sessions and presented their papers.
